shorts.description: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A flowery festival in our area is coming to an end: Visitors came to Lakeland Orchard and Cidery in Scott Township on Sunday to enjoy an eight-acre tulip farm. Sunshine replaced rain, put a damper on the tulip festival during Mother's Day, so on Sunday, some visitors cashed in [...]
shorts.content: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A flowery festival in our area is coming to an end: Visitors came to Lakeland Orchard and Cidery in Scott Township on Sunday to enjoy an eight-acre tulip farm. Sunshine replaced rain, put a damper on the tulip festival during Mother's Day, so on Sunday, some visitors cashed in [...]
shorts.content_distilled: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — A flowery festival in our area is coming to an end: Visitors came to Lakeland Orchard and Cidery in Scott Township on Sunday to enjoy an eight-acre tulip farm.

entities.name: Residents enjoy final day of flowery festival
